parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({queries: ($json.body && $json.body.queries) || [($json.body && $json.body.query) || ''], lat: ($json.body && $json.body.lat) || null, lng: ($json.body && $json.body.lng) || null, zoom: ($json.body && $json.body.zoom) || 12, country_code: ($json.body && $json.body.countryCode) || 'us', language: ($json.body && $json.body.language) || 'en', results_per_query: ($json.body && $json.body.resultsPerQuery) || 20, status: 'running'}) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({status: 'success', leads_found: $('Aggregate Leads').first().json.count, completed_at: new Date().toISOString()}) }}
